---
name: New Data Source
about: Request or propose a new radar/weather data source
title: "[Source] "
labels: data-source
assignees: ''
---

**Data source name**
e.g. JMA (Japan Meteorological Agency), BOM (Australia), OPERA (pan-European)

**Data format**
What format is the data in? (GRIB2, HDF5, NetCDF, WMS, API, etc.)

**Access method**
How is the data accessed? (Public S3, HTTP, FTP, API with key, etc.)

**Coverage area**
What geographic region does this source cover?

**Resolution and update frequency**
Spatial resolution (e.g. 1km) and how often it updates (e.g. every 5 minutes).

**Data URL or documentation**
Links to the data source, API docs, or examples.

**Additional context**
Anything else — licensing restrictions, authentication requirements, quirks.
